description: Express.js route definitions for orchestration API endpoints related to build workflows, document linking, extraction/normalization, persona draft generation, and finalization.

methods.name: router.post('/start')
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session and build workflow.

methods.name: router.post('/run-all')
methods.description: Runs the full build workflow end-to-end in a single call.

methods.name: router.get('/builds/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record for a specific build ID.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/link-upload')
methods.description: Links upload and document IDs to an existing build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/extract-normalize')
methods.description: Derives combined normalized text from linked documents for a build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/generate-draft')
methods.description: Generates a persona draft from normalized text.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/finalize')
methods.description: Finalizes the persona, saving the final blob and creating a new version if needed.
